name: Hydro Flare (Stage 2)
description: The evolved steam titan. It manipulates thermal convection currents to summon boiling tsunamis and vaporize thermal energy in seconds.
originLore: Maturing in the superheated currents of interstellar nebulae, stage 2 Hydro Flare controls phase transitions between liquid, steam, and plasma.

lore.celestialConcordance: Hydro Flare Stage 2 regulates planetary ocean temperatures, preventing thermal runaway across watery worlds.

quantumResonators.name: Boiling Tsunami
quantumResonators.description: Summons a crashing wave of boiling plasma-infused water.

quantumResonators.name: Vapor Compression
quantumResonators.description: Compresses steam into dense explosive spheres that detonate on contact.
